login.subtitle: Please enter connection information to access the management interface

login.error_timeout: Connection timed out, server not responding

basic_settings.request_log_warning: Keep this off unless you need detailed troubleshooting.

auth_files.title: Auth Files Management
auth_files.description: Manage all CLI Proxy JSON auth files here (e.g. Qwen, Gemini, Vertex). Uploading a credential immediately enables the corresponding AI integration.
auth_files.empty_desc: Click the button above to upload the first file
auth_files.search_empty_desc: Try changing the filters or clearing the search box.
auth_files.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete file
auth_files.delete_all_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all auth files? This operation cannot be undone!
auth_files.delete_filtered_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all {{type}} auth files? This operation cannot be undone!
auth_files.delete_problem_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all problematic auth files? This operation cannot be undone!
auth_files.delete_problem_filtered_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all problematic {{type}} auth files? This operation cannot be undone!
auth_files.delete_filtered_result_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete auth files in the current filtered results? This operation cannot be undone!
auth_files.delete_filtered_partial: {{type}} auth files deletion finished: {{success}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed
auth_files.delete_filtered_none: No deletable auth files under the current filter ({{type}})
auth_files.delete_problem_partial: Problematic auth files deletion finished: {{success}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed
auth_files.delete_problem_filtered_partial: Problematic {{type}} auth files deletion finished: {{success}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed
auth_files.delete_problem_none: No deletable problematic auth files under the current filter
auth_files.delete_problem_filtered_none: No deletable problematic {{type}} auth files under the current filter
auth_files.delete_filtered_result_success: Deleted {{count}} auth files from the filtered results successfully
auth_files.delete_filtered_result_partial: Filtered result deletion finished: {{success}} succeeded, {{failed}} failed
auth_files.delete_filtered_result_none: No deletable auth files in the current filtered results
auth_files.search_placeholder: Filter by name, type, or provider. Use * as a wildcard
auth_files.too_many_files_warning: Too many credentials. Showing all may cause performance issues, please use paged view.
auth_files.models_empty: No available models for this credential
auth_files.models_empty_desc: This credential may not be loaded by the server yet, or no models are bound to it.
auth_files.models_unsupported: This feature is not supported in the current version
auth_files.models_unsupported_desc: Please update CLI Proxy API to the latest version and try again
auth_files.batch_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} files?
auth_files.codex_cleanup_select_hint: Choose a credential type to clean. Enabled credentials of that type are verified; only invalid ones (upstream 4xx) are deleted.
auth_files.priority_hint: Integers only. Invalid values are ignored. Larger value means higher priority.
auth_files.websockets_hint: Enable Responses API websocket transport for this credential.
auth_files.excluded_models_placeholder: Comma or newline separated, e.g. model-a, gpt-5-*, *-preview
auth_files.excluded_models_hint: Saved as an array and normalized by trim/lowercase/dedup/sort.
auth_files.disable_cooling_hint: Supports booleans, numeric 0/non-0, and strings like true/false/1/0; unparseable values are ignored.
auth_files.using_api_hint: Use the official xAI API when enabled; use Grok CLI chat-proxy when disabled.
auth_files.note_placeholder: Enter a note, e.g.: John's account
auth_files.note_hint: Optional. Used to describe the purpose or owner of this credential; leave empty to omit.
auth_files.headers_hint: Enter custom HTTP headers as a JSON object, e.g., {"X-My-Header": "value"}
auth_files.headers_invalid_json: Custom headers must be valid JSON.
auth_files.headers_invalid_object: Custom headers must be a JSON object.
auth_files.headers_invalid_value: Each custom header value must be a string.
auth_files.prefix_proxy_invalid_json: This auth file is not a JSON object, so fields cannot be edited.
auth_files.prefix_proxy_html_challenge: Downloaded content is an HTML challenge page, not an auth JSON object. Re-authenticate or replace this auth file before editing fields.

vertex_import.title: Vertex JSON Login
vertex_import.description: Upload a Google service account JSON to store it as auth-dir/vertex-<project>.json using the same rules as the CLI vertex-import helper.
vertex_import.location_hint: Leave empty to use the default region us-central1.
vertex_import.file_hint: Only Google Cloud service account key JSON files are accepted.

oauth_excluded.title: OAuth Model Disablement
oauth_excluded.description: Per-provider model disablement is shown as cards; click a card to edit or delete. Wildcards * are supported and the scope follows the auth file filter.
oauth_excluded.provider_hint: Defaults to the current filter; pick an existing provider or type a new name.
oauth_excluded.models_unsupported: Current CPA version does not support fetching model lists.
oauth_excluded.models_loaded: {{count}} models loaded. Check the models to disable.
oauth_excluded.no_models_available: No models available for this provider.
oauth_excluded.custom_rule_hint: Enter an exact model ID or a wildcard rule such as gpt-*.
oauth_excluded.list_empty_all: No provider model disablement yet; click “Add Disablement” to create one.
oauth_excluded.list_empty_filtered: No disabled items in this scope; click “Add Disablement” to add.
oauth_excluded.disconnected: Connect to the server to view model disablement
oauth_excluded.upgrade_required: Current CPA version does not support OAuth model disablement. Please upgrade.
oauth_excluded.upgrade_required_desc: The current server version does not support fetching OAuth model disablement. Please upgrade to the latest CPA (CLI Proxy API) version and try again.

oauth_model_alias.title: OAuth Model Aliases
oauth_model_alias.provider_hint: Defaults to the current filter; pick an existing provider or type a new name.
oauth_model_alias.model_source_unsupported: The current CPA version does not support fetching model lists (manual input still works).
oauth_model_alias.model_source_loaded: {{count}} models loaded. Use the dropdown in 'Source model name', or type custom values. Saving an empty list removes that provider. Enable 'Keep original' to keep the original name while adding the alias.
oauth_model_alias.delete_alias_confirm: Delete alias {{alias}} and unmap all associated models?
oauth_model_alias.list_empty_all: No model aliases yet—use “Add Alias” to create one.
oauth_model_alias.diagram_settings_empty: No mappings for this alias yet.
oauth_model_alias.diagram_tap_hint: On touch devices: tap a source model, then tap an alias to link.
oauth_model_alias.upgrade_required: This feature requires a newer CLI Proxy API (CPA) version. Please upgrade.
oauth_model_alias.upgrade_required_desc: The current server does not support the OAuth model aliases API. Please upgrade to the latest CLI Proxy API (CPA) version.

auth_login.codex_oauth_hint: Login to Codex service through OAuth flow, automatically obtain and save authentication files.
auth_login.anthropic_oauth_hint: Login to Anthropic (Claude) service through OAuth flow, automatically obtain and save authentication files.
auth_login.antigravity_oauth_hint: Login to Antigravity service (Google account) through OAuth flow, automatically obtain and save authentication files.

auth_login.xai_oauth_hint: Login to xAI Grok through OAuth flow, automatically obtain and save authentication files.
auth_login.plugin_oauth_hint: Log in to {{name}} through the plugin OAuth flow, automatically obtain and save authentication files.
auth_login.xai_callback_placeholder: Paste the code shown by Grok, or the full callback URL

auth_login.xai_callback_required: Please paste the code shown by Grok or the full callback URL first.
auth_login.xai_callback_state_missing: Missing the state for this xAI login. Start xAI login again, then submit the code.
auth_login.oauth_callback_hint: Remote browser mode: after the provider redirects to http://localhost:..., copy the full URL and submit it here.
auth_login.oauth_callback_required: Please paste the full redirect URL first.
auth_login.oauth_callback_success: Callback URL submitted. Continue waiting for authentication.
auth_login.oauth_callback_upgrade_hint: Please update CLI Proxy API or check the connection.
auth_login.oauth_callback_status_success: Callback URL submitted, waiting for authentication...
auth_login.missing_state: Unable to retrieve authentication state parameter
auth_login.iflow_oauth_hint: Login to iFlow service through OAuth flow, automatically obtain and save authentication files.
auth_login.remote_access_disabled: This login method is not available for remote access. Please access from localhost.

logs.title: Logs Viewer
logs.error_logs_description: Pick an error request log file to download (only generated when request logging is off).
logs.error_logs_request_log_enabled: Request logging is enabled, so this list will always be empty. Disable request logging and refresh to view error logs.
logs.error_logs_empty: No error request log files found
logs.error_logs_load_error: Failed to load error log list
logs.empty_desc: When "Enable logging to file" is enabled, logs will be displayed here
logs.clear_confirm: Are you sure you want to clear all logs? This action cannot be undone!
logs.show_raw_logs_hint: Show original log text for easier multi-line copy
logs.search_placeholder: Search logs by content or keyword
logs.trace_notice: V1 uses heuristic correlation between logs and usage events. Results are estimates, not strict request_id matches.
logs.trace_usage_load_error: Failed to load usage details for tracing
logs.search_empty_desc: Try a different keyword or clear the filters.
logs.double_click_copy_hint: Double-click to copy raw log line
logs.upgrade_required_desc: The current server version does not support the logs viewing feature. Please upgrade to the latest version of CLI Proxy API to use this feature.

config_management.title: Config Panel
config_management.reload_confirm_message: Reloading will discard your unsaved changes. Do you want to continue?
config_management.description: Edit config.yaml via visual editor or source file
config_management.status_disconnected: Connect to the server to load the configuration
config_management.error_yaml_not_supported: Server did not return YAML. Verify the /config.yaml endpoint is available.
config_management.visual_mode_unavailable: Visual editor unavailable until YAML syntax is fixed
config_management.visual_mode_unavailable_detail: Visual editor is unavailable because the configuration contains invalid YAML: {{message}}
config_management.visual_mode_save_blocked: Cannot save from visual mode until the YAML syntax is fixed
config_management.visual_mode_latest_yaml_invalid: The latest server configuration contains invalid YAML. Review it in source mode before saving visual changes: {{message}}

visual.notice: Visual mode only covers common supported fields. Other config.yaml fields still need to be reviewed and edited in source mode.

remote.title: Remote Management
remote.description: Remote access and control panel settings
remote.allow_remote_desc: Allow management access from other hosts
remote.disable_panel_desc: Disable the built-in web control panel

auth.title: Authentication Configuration
auth.description: API keys and authentication directory settings

system.title: System Configuration
system.description: Debug, logging, statistics, and performance settings
system.commercial_mode_desc: Disable high-overhead middleware to support high concurrency
system.plugins_enabled_desc: Enable standard dynamic-library plugin loading; individual plugin instances are still managed on the Plugins page
system.plugin_store_sources_desc: Append plugin-store registry sources; the built-in official source is always kept
system.plugin_store_sources_hint: One registry.json URL per row. Empty rows are filtered on save
system.store_auth_hint: Rules for adding credentials when loading registries, metadata, or plugin artifacts. Values reference environment variable names; secrets are not stored in config.yaml.
system.store_auth_empty: No plugin store authentication rules configured.
system.store_auth_apply_to_hint: Leave empty to let the backend choose the default scope.

network.title: Network Configuration
network.max_retry_credentials_hint: Leave empty to keep it unset. Set to 0 to preserve legacy behavior and try all available credentials.
network.gpt_image_2_base_model_hint: Mainline model used when proxying gpt-image-2 image requests; backend uses its default when empty or invalid
network.codex_identity_confuse_desc: When fill-first routing or session affinity is used, remap Codex prompt_cache_key and installation identity for the selected auth
network.force_model_prefix_desc: Unprefixed model requests only use credentials without prefix

quota.title: Quota Fallback
quota.description: Fallback strategy when quota is exceeded
quota.switch_project_desc: Automatically switch to another project when quota is exceeded
quota.switch_preview_model_desc: Switch to preview model version when quota is exceeded
quota.antigravity_credits_desc: Retry once with enabledCreditTypes=["GOOGLE_ONE_AI"] when Antigravity returns quota_exhausted 429

streaming.title: Streaming Configuration
streaming.keepalive_hint: Set to 0 or leave empty to disable keepalive
streaming.bootstrap_hint: Number of retries during stream startup (before first byte)
streaming.nonstream_keepalive_hint: Send blank lines every N seconds for non-streaming responses to prevent idle timeout, set to 0 or leave empty to disable

payload.title: Payload Configuration
payload.description: Default values, raw JSON rules, override rules, and filter rules
payload.default_rules_desc: Use these default values when parameters are not specified in the request
payload.default_raw_rules_desc: When parameters are missing, write these values as raw JSON fragments such as true, 123, "high", or {"type":"object"}
payload.override_rules_desc: Force override parameter values in the request
payload.override_raw_rules_desc: Always overwrite parameter values as raw JSON fragments, useful for response_format, schemas, and other complex fields
payload.filter_rules_desc: Pre-filter upstream request body via JSON Path, automatically remove non-compliant/redundant parameters (Request Sanitization)

api_keys.label: API Keys List (api-keys)
api_keys.hint: Each entry represents an API key (consistent with 'API Key Management' page style)
api_keys.input_hint: This only modifies the local config file content, it will not sync to the API Key Management interface

payload_rules.value_raw_json: Raw JSON fragment, e.g. true, 123, "high", or {"type":"object"}

validation.port_range: Enter a valid port between 1 and 65535

quota_management.title: Quota Management
quota_management.description: Monitor OAuth quota status for Antigravity, Codex, and Gemini CLI credentials.

plugin_management.title: Plugin Management
plugin_management.description: Review discovered and registered plugins, then manage instance toggles, config fields, and resource links.
plugin_management.config_not_found: Unable to read plugin config because the backend could not find this plugin.
plugin_management.unsupported_backend: The current backend does not expose the plugin management API. Use a newer backend build that includes plugin management endpoints, then restart the service.
plugin_management.global_disabled_hint: plugins.enabled is false, so enabled plugin instances will not become effective.
plugin_management.search_placeholder: Search plugin ID, name, author, or resource...
plugin_management.no_plugins_desc: No plugins were found in the plugin directory or runtime registry.
plugin_management.enabled_hint: Controls the enabled field for this plugin instance under plugins.configs.
plugin_management.no_config_fields: This plugin does not declare visual config fields.
plugin_management.delete_confirm_message: Delete {{name}} ({{id}})? This removes the local plugin file and saved config.
plugin_management.delete_restart_required: The loaded plugin cannot be removed until the backend restarts.
plugin_management.runtime_pending: Plugin change was saved, but the runtime state is still pending. Refresh later or check backend logs.
plugin_management.validation_failed: Fix plugin config form errors first
plugin_management.invalid_enum: Choose one of the declared enum values

plugin_store.title: Plugin Store
plugin_store.description: Browse the plugin registry, then install or update plugins for the current backend.
plugin_store.load_failed: Failed to load the plugin store
plugin_store.unsupported_backend: The current backend does not expose the plugin store API. Use a newer backend build that includes plugin store endpoints, then restart the service.
plugin_store.registry_failed: Failed to reach the plugin registry
plugin_store.global_disabled_hint: plugins.enabled is false, so installed plugins will not become effective.
plugin_store.search_placeholder: Search plugin ID, name, author, or tag...
plugin_store.install_confirm_message: Download {{target}} from the plugin registry and install it into the local plugin directory?
plugin_store.install_version_latest_hint: Resolved by the backend during install. Current listed version: {{version}}.
plugin_store.install_version_release_hint: Read installable tags from GitHub Releases.
plugin_store.install_version_manual_hint: Use only when automatic release loading is unavailable.
plugin_store.install_version_non_github: This plugin repository is not a GitHub repository
plugin_store.install_versions_only_prerelease: Only prerelease versions are available. Show prereleases to choose one.
plugin_store.install_version_manual_error: Release tags can only contain letters, numbers, dots, underscores, plus signs, and hyphens; spaces and slashes are not allowed.
plugin_store.install_version_current_selected: {{version}} is already installed. Choose another version.
plugin_store.status_pending: Plugin files were updated, but the local status has not refreshed yet. Refresh later or check backend logs.
plugin_store.registration_pending: Plugin files were updated, but registration is still pending. Refresh later or check backend logs.
plugin_store.restart_required_notice: Restart the service to load the new plugin version
plugin_store.restart_required_banner: Restart the service to apply the new version of: {{plugins}}
plugin_store.no_plugins_desc: The plugin registry did not return any plugins.
plugin_store.no_matches_desc: No plugins match the current search or filter.
plugin_store.security_banner_title: Third-party plugins run with full backend access
plugin_store.security_banner_text: Plugins execute code inside the proxy service and can read your credentials and traffic. Only install plugins you trust — be especially careful with any plugin not published by the official router-for-me organization.
plugin_store.gate_warning: Unexpected and harmful things can happen if you don't read this.
plugin_store.gate_effect_runs_code: This plugin will run uncertified third-party code inside your proxy backend. The system cannot isolate or audit its behavior, and it may have access to your sensitive credentials, network requests, and response data.
plugin_store.gate_effect_no_review: This plugin is not published or reviewed by the official router-for-me organization. The official organization makes no express or implied warranty for this plugin's stability, security, compliance, or any behavior changes in future versions.
plugin_store.gate_effect_restart: Installing it changes the local plugin directory and may require a service restart to take effect.
plugin_store.gate_untrusted_alert: This plugin is not from the official router-for-me organization. Only continue if you fully trust its author and source.
plugin_store.gate_step1_action: I want to install this plugin
plugin_store.gate_step2_action: I have read and understand these risks
plugin_store.gate_step3_prompt: To confirm, type "{{token}}" in the box below
plugin_store.gate_step3_hint: Enter the exact identifier shown above to enable installation.

plugin_resource.title: Plugin Page
plugin_resource.not_found_desc: This plugin page is not declared by the current backend plugin list.
plugin_resource.empty_src_desc: This plugin menu does not provide an embeddable page URL.

system_info.title: Management Center Info
system_info.models_desc: Shows the /models response and uses saved API keys for auth automatically.
system_info.version_check_desc: Call the /latest-version endpoint to compare with the server version and see if an update is available.
system_info.version_is_latest: You are on the latest version
system_info.version_current_missing: Server version is unavailable; cannot compare
system_info.panel_version_current_missing: Management Center version is unavailable; cannot compare
system_info.panel_version_updated_refresh: Management Center was updated to {{version}}. Refresh the page to use it.
system_info.quick_links_desc: Access project repositories and documentation for help and updates.
system_info.link_main_repo_desc: CLI Proxy API core program source code
system_info.clear_login_desc: Clear locally saved login data and sign out. Usage stats pricing settings will remain untouched.
system_info.clear_login_confirm: Clear local login data and sign out now?
